title: Azures Deathswap
description: A minecraft Deathswap server side mod for unlimited players
body:
📜 Deathswap

Game Idea
Deathswap is a survival challenge where players are randomly swapped into each other’s locations. The goal is to set traps and outsmart your opponents so that when the swap happens, they die instead of you. Last player standing wins.

How to Start

Begin the game with:

/function deathswap:start


⚠️ Do not use any other functions — only start the game with this command, or it may break.

Game Rules & Features

Supports any number of players (minimum of 2).

Every player starts with 3 lives.

The game has a 10-minute grace period before the first swap.

After that, players are swapped every 5 minutes.
